test_name: Super Admin - Show List of all Institutes
description:
Navigate to https://dev2.heartnetnetindiademo.in/connect.
a. Enter username as admin.
b. Enter password as admin.
c. Click the Login button and wait for the dashboard to load.
d. Navigate to the Institutes section from the main menu.
e. Wait for the Institutes list to load completely.
f. Verify that all entries are displayed with relevant columns (name, status, date, etc.).
g. Scroll through the list to confirm pagination or full data load.
h. Apply an available search or filter and verify the list updates correctly.
i. Remove the filter and confirm all records are shown again.
expected_result: The complete Institutes list is displayed with all relevant columns and data; filters and search work correctly.
